name: Complete OG and Twitter tags
html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta property='og:title' content='My Awesome Page'><meta property='og:description' content='This is an awesome page about something amazing that will change your life forever.'><meta property='og:image' content='https://example.com/image.jpg'><meta property='og:url' content='https://example.com/page'><meta property='og:type' content='website'><meta property='og:site_name' content='Example'><meta name='twitter:card' content='summary_large_image'><meta name='twitter:title' content='My Awesome Page'><meta name='twitter:description' content='This is an awesome page about something amazing.'><meta name='twitter:image' content='https://example.com/image.jpg'><title>My Page</title></head><body></body></html>

preview.title: My Awesome Page
preview.description: This is an awesome page about something amazing that will change your life forever.

issues: ⚠️ og:title is too short (5 chars, min 10)

name: OG tag too long
html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta property='og:title' content='This is an extremely long title that exceeds the maximum length allowed for optimal social media sharing and display purposes'><meta property='og:description' content='This is a description that is definitely way too long to be effective and should be shortened to improve click-through rates and user engagement across platforms.'><meta property='og:image' content='https://example.com/image.jpg'><meta property='og:url' content='https://example.com/page'><meta property='og:type' content='website'><meta name='twitter:card' content='summary_large_image'><title>Test</title></head><body></body></html>

name: Relative OG image URL
html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta property='og:title' content='Test Title'><meta property='og:description' content='This is a test description that is long enough for OG purposes and should pass validation.'><meta property='og:image' content='/images/test.jpg'><meta property='og:url' content='https://example.com/page'><meta property='og:type' content='website'><meta name='twitter:card' content='summary_large_image'><title>Test</title></head><body></body></html>

issues: ⚠️ og:image should be an absolute URL

name: Invalid Twitter card type
html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta property='og:title' content='Test Title'><meta property='og:description' content='This is a test description that is long enough for OG purposes.'><meta property='og:image' content='https://example.com/image.jpg'><meta property='og:url' content='https://example.com/page'><meta property='og:type' content='website'><meta name='twitter:card' content='invalid_type'><title>Test</title></head><body></body></html>

issues: ⚠️ twitter:card has invalid value 'invalid_type' — valid: summary, summary_large_image, app, player

name: No social meta tags at all

recommendations: Add Open Graph tags for rich social media previews on Facebook, LinkedIn, etc.
Add Twitter Card tags for rich previews on X (Twitter)
